original: A physique-based attack that does not benefit from weapon damage but has a chance of stunning your target.
Perform a long range attack with two additional, low accuracy shots following it.
Perform a melee attack with two additional, low accuracy melee hits following it.
Fire a lust grenade to arouse all combatants and reduce the visibility on the battlefield.
Strike once with a melee weapon for 200% of normal damage.
Perform a single melee attack. If it hits, follow up with ‘Rapid Fire’ ranged attacks with enhanced accuracy and +25% critical hit chance, regardless of if you have the ‘Rapid Fire’ ability or not.
Launch into the air to crash down on a foe for heavy damage. Does +50% bonus damage to flying or prone targets.
An attack that is extra effective against multiple foes. Its damage is increased by level and intelligence.
Deals a high amount of level and intelligence-based burning damage against a single foe.
You enter a Blood Frenzy for 3 turns and make a melee strike against every enemy. While in the Frenzy, each melee hit you land deals bonus damage and restores health equal to 25% damage dealt.
Load tracer ammunition that lasts for three turns, then make a full ranged attack.\n\nTracer rounds grant +20 accuracy and +5 burning damage.
Increased ranged evasion to 90% for three turns.
Regenerate 50% of your maximum HP and energy once per battle! An invaluable ability for the mercenary in the field.
Suckle on your own breast and drink some [pc.milk] to recover your vitality!\n\n<b>[pc.MilkNoun] Required:
Reduces HP damage taken by 30% but increases Lust damage taken by 30%.

For 3 turns, fill the battlefield with an aphrodisiac gas that has a chance to blind all other combatants (for 1 turn), dealing drug damage.[pc.hasAirtightSuit| You will have to open your airtight armor for this, ruining its ability to keep you vacuum-sealed for the remainder of the fight.]
An ability with an intelligence-based chance to paralyze a single foe. Enemies with higher physique scores will be more likely to resist its effects!
Perform a ranged attack with an additional, low-accuracy attack added on. Can blind foes based upon aim and the target’s reflexes, but only if done with an energy weapon.
Electrify a melee weapon for the duration of the battle and take a single, low-accuracy swipe with the charged weapon.
A powerful ranged attack, Overcharge deals [altTooltip Overcharge]% damage and has a chance of stunning. Higher intelligence increases the chance of successfully stunning your foe.
Restores a portion of your shields and energy every turn for four turns. Higher intelligence will increase the amount.\n\nOnce per combat.
Restores a moderate amount of shields and energy based on intelligence.\n\nOnce per combat.
Deals a large amount of intelligence-based, burning damage to a single target before spreading out to nearby foes.
Deals a moderate amount of intelligence-based, unresistable damage to a single target before spreading out to nearby foes.
An attack that deals a high amount of electric-typed damage to a target’s shields. Damage is increased by intelligence.
Attempt to neutralize a foe’s energy weapon using your intelligence. Smarter foes will resist your attempts.
Charge your shield so that it can overload when struck, creating flashes bright enough to blind the unwary - or zap those stupid enough to try for a punch.
Overclock yourself into a hastened state, increasing your evasion by 5 and enhancing your basic melee and ranged attacks with an additional flurry strike.

Deploy a compact, self-assembling turret onto the battlefield. This turret comes armed with a basic laser turret and deploys with its own pool of hit points and shields. It lasts for the duration of the battle or until destroyed.
Massively overheat an energy weapon such that the shot deals large amounts of intelligence-scaled burning damage and applies a damage over time effect.
Electrically overload a melee weapon for a single strike, dealing intelligence-scaled electricity damage that splashes onto other enemies. Automatically stuns robotic and heavily augmented foes.
Produce some sand from your level and use it to blind your enemies! Better aim will help you land the attack.
Produce a rechargeable flash grenade and use it to blind your enemy. Better aim will increase the chance of success.
A melee ability with a physique-based chance of stunning your target. It does low damage, and stronger foes will be more able to resist being stunned.

A single shot that will disable your target’s usage of traditional weapons - if it hits. The strike has the same chance of hitting as any other shot. Note that this does not effect creatures or machines with integrated weaponry.
Creates a stealth field that greatly increases your evasion by 80% (max evasion +30%) for a few turns.
Does a moderate amount of intelligence-based thermal and kinetic damage to your enemies.
An unavoidable attack that deals a fair amount of lust damage to your enemies. Increases slightly with level.
Inject yourself with a smuggled stimulant, causing you to recover 25 energy a turn for three turns.
Get a burst of energy, recovering 60 energy.\n\nYou may only do this once per encounter.
Throw a set of magnetic restraints at your enemy, dealing light electricity damage and potentially stunning them for up to three turns. Damage and hit chances are based off of reflexes.
Take aim at a target’s head for additional level-scaled damage (unresistable), intelligence-scaled critical chance, and a chance to blind the target.
Make a melee attack with extra damage that increases the more injured the target is. May stun survivors.

Take to the sky with backpack-mounted microboosters for four turns. While launching, make one flurry attack with a ranged weapon and gain the ability to sneak attack or aimed shot non-flying targets while flying. For the duration of your flight, your evasion is temporarily increased.
Fire an explosive arrow at your target, potentially stunning them for 1-2 rounds.

Spray three lower-accuracy darts of force at a target, each dealing low kinetic damage. Guaranteed to hit at least once! Dart accuracy is based on intelligence. Dart damage scales with willpower.\n\nFires an additional dart at level 6 and level 12.

Draws energy away from the target, dealing light cold damage and restoring some energy.
Restores more energy when energy is low.
Can rarely freeze targets.

(Willpower vs Physique)
Unleashes a burst of kinetic energy next to an enemy, dealing middling kinetic damage. Has a chance to disarm.\n\n(Willpower vs Reflex)
Unleashes a torrent of thermal energy, dealing middling burning damage. Has a chance to sunder the target’s armor for several turns.\n\n(Willpower vs Reflex)
Draws upon extradimensional energies to instantly recover 75% of your maximum energy and maximum health. Usable once per battle.
For three turns after activation, leech 50% of damage dealt into your HP. Additionally, recover 10 energy on each round damage is dealt.
Projects an entropic field over the surrounding area for three turns, dealing low, unavoidable damage and repeatedly attempting to sunder affected targets.
Causes gravity to become crushingly high, dealing moderate unresistable damage to all enemies and additional kinetic damage to flying enemies. May cause the tripped condition.
Applies a vortex to a target that draws attacks toward them, reducing dodge chance by 50% and increasing all damage taken by 15% for 5 rounds.
Fill the battlefield with whirling debris that have a chance to blind all other combatants each turn for 6 turns.

Rips a spike of material out of the ground under your target’s feet to deal moderate burning and kinetic energy.

Crits tripped targets.
Flying targets are immune.
A moderately powerful freeze-whip attack. Can miss. Struck targets must make a physique save against the “Deep Freeze” effect. Automatically mini-crits sundered or disarmed targets.
A moderately powerful corrosive attack. Undodgeable. Automatically crits immobilized targets. Automatically mini-crits (1.5x) frozen targets.
Deal a moderate amount of Crushing kinetic damage. Organic opponents can be stunned for 2-3 turns. Has a four round cooldown.

Apply a buff that grants an additional flurry attack when using basic melee or ranged abilities. When used, it will automatically make a full or ranged or melee attack with the buff, selecting whichever hits harder. Haste lasts for ten turns.
Thin the fabric of reality in this location, increasing the damage of your activated psionic abilities by 20% for the remainder of the fight.

Slams a target around for crushing kinetic damage three times, dealing higher damage to smaller foes. Targets with very high reflexes may sometimes reduce their damage taken. Has a four round cooldown.

Pins a target under the weight of their own gravity, dealing very high unresistible damage that scales up with the size of the target. Targets with very high physique may sometimes reduce their damage taken. Has a four round cooldown.
Purges all internal poison and aphrodisiac effects with a scouring rush of physioactive psychic power. Increases resistance to poison and drug damage by 25% for the remainder of combat.
Allows sight without sight. On activation remove any blinding effects, become immune to blind, and gain +10 accuracy for the remainder of the encounter.
Fire a Gray Goo at your enemy for the princely sum of a single sample of Gray Microbots.
Harden your bark skin with amber to raise your defenses for a few rounds. The sap’s aroma may also affect the enemy’s lust.
Use your special pollen spores to gradually raise your enemy’s lust for a few rounds.
Use the Zinga 16b’s alternate fire mode.
Psychicly leech your target’s energy, empowering your evasion while reducing their physique and reflexes.
Use your helmet’s hailers to release a sonic wave!
A shockwave of concussive energy bursts across "+{var0}.getCombatName()+"!

original: It’s an extremely risky move, but one nicking with your venom-coated fangs could change the game. Forcing into the Jumper’s personal space, dodging a fist, you grasp for her head and only eat an uppercut that predictably sends you arcing backwards. Fucking hell... at least that didn’t obliterate your teeth. Better not try that again while she’s still aware.

In a stunned and vulnerable state, [sophora.nameKnown|Sophora|the bun] can’t stop you from closing the distance and biting at her lips and cheek. Because her neck isn’t available, you hope it can move fast through there! Watching her experience the familiar effects of venomous aphrodisiac, you allow yourself a tiny smile.
You don’t manage to get close enough to your opponent this time.

original: At first it seems impossible, but your sheer brawn overpowers the killer laquine. There’s a tremble in her eyes that excites you, and then she pulls herself away, legs unbalanced. You stunned her... somehow!
It doesn’t look to have stunned your foe!
But, inside her, there’s only the hunt and the need to hurt. She lurches back and thrusts you away, not much worse for the wear.
It didn’t manage to stun you.

With an almost preternatural sense of self-preservation,
As the smoke clears, you see
shaking, and looking hardly worse for wear!

original: Already defeated, the detonation on ".concat(n.getCombatName()," was of no use!")

[pc.isChestGarbed|Shedding your [pc.chestCover], you|You] bring[pc.breastRowsRange 2| one of] your [pc.milkyNipples] up to your [pc.lips] and gulp the [pc.milkFlavor] liquid down until you are completely full.
Due to your extra milky ability, an unexpected burst of fluid fills your gullet and almost makes you choke on your drink!
You feel revitalized, but you better end this fight before your [pc.milkNoun]’s aphrodisiacs kick in...

Needing a boost, you reach to activate the Biological Stimulant Package. A sharp pain stings your back as needles inoculate you with experimental drugs! The glowing liquid spreads through your veins, making your heart race faster. Indomitable vigor fills your every cell, insulating you against kinetic blows and energy weapons, but the enhanced verse also leaves you feeling warm and open t new experiences.... You bite your [pc.lipsChaste], struggling to deal with your increased sensitivity. You need to finish this before your lusty thoughts can be turned against you!
However "+{var0}.getCombatName()+" absorbs the electricity and it seems to strengthen it. "+{var1}.printStatChange("S",25,"shieldHeal","shield")

original: A palpable sense of relief washes over you as you move to recharge your shielding. The laquine over-commits on her attack all the same,
, points the edge at you, and makes a cutthroat motion. As if you could ever forget why she’s here.
A palpable sense of relief washes over you as you move to recharge your shielding. The laquine over-commits on her attack all the same,
, points the edge at you, and makes a cutthroat motion. As if you could ever forget why she’s here.
The flames surge, licking at your target’s compatriots!

Keeping that hair trigger reflex in check, you don’t discharge the weapon until she stops moving for that split, heart-stopping second. BWOORSH! It connects! She lets out a bestial roar (in so much as her fragged vocal cords can manage) and lashes the lingering flames from her arms and legs fitfully. You only get a second to celebrate before she emerges from the scorched ground, ready to tear you asunder.
The disruption spreads to encompass a small, localized area neatly surrounding your enemies!

Nothing in the known universe can resist the power of raw, concentrated gravity. [sophora.nameKnown|Sophora|This Jumper] is no exception -- she hits the ground with a bone-cracking thud. Her body shudders with unnatural exertion, the very strength animating her evaporating for the duration of your attack.\n\n\t\t\tAgainst all odds, she breaks out of the field, shakes the cricks from her body, and leers.
The lingering gravitic field will reduce all kinetic damage!
However "+{var0}.getCombatName()+" absorbs the electrical surge and it seems to strengthen it. "+{var1}.printStatChange("S",25,"shieldHeal","shield")

original: Tracking the knife in the dark is substantially harder than a bright blue energy sword. No matter where you aim, no matter how patiently you seek it, you can’t dislodge the blade from the Jumper’s paw. Try anymore and she’ll probably reflect the shot back at you somehow.

Finding tar-black bunny’s paws as they manically flex and jerk and writhe proves to be one of your greatest challenges. The hand-eye coordination required by this stupendous achievement is beyond compare, but, fucking hell, you do it. Considering the variables with a sharpshooter’s efficacy, you snipe [sophora.nameKnown|Sophora’s|the laquine’s] gun from her grip, and the other when she reaches. The subsequent imbalance and stumbling grants you another opportunity: to loose that sword from her other hand. Inhale, count to two, exhale and clock her cold. Plingcksshh! The cryonic sword pinwheels into obscurity, some inner safety precaution disabling the lethal bits. “Ghaaaah!!” she yells, an enraged sound like someone trying not to make too much noise in the house at night. Although you hit her square in the wrist and hand respectively, no visible damage has been done, and rather than scrabble for her gear, she makes a horrifyingly mad dash in your direction, launching into a roundhouse kick strong enough to re-orbit a planet. You narrowly duck the brain-basher and get some distance. In her hands is a knife; in her eyes burns a primordial desire to kill.
Total invisibility may not be possible, but a hi-tech obscurant will do the trick. No sooner has light bended than

No sooner do you fling your fragmentary payload than [sophora.nameKnown|Sophora|the laquina] morphs into a ball. The world quivers from the explosive impact. Yet, when the Jumper rises from her squat, she is no worse for the wear.\n\n\t\t\tKinetic attacks are next-to-useless against her! Change your tactics!
“You... W-what the h-hell is this? Did you get tha... thaaaa-TT from one of the Vipers?!” comes a lewd cry, the lust obvious in ".concat(s.getCombatPronoun("hisher")," unsteady speech.")

When [sophora.nameKnown|Sophora|the laquine] swings, you fling out your mag binders, their inner circuitries coming to life. The Jumper sees them coming a mile away, however, flicking each band aside with accurate kicks and punches. Damnit.

You allow [sophora.nameKnown|Sophora|the Jumper] to whittle at your defenses, let her gain ground, until she walks into a tiger pit. One vicious coup-de-grace dodged, one kick square on her ass, you then hurl out your mag binders, their inner circuitries coming to life midair. “Nngg!?” Wide, suited wrists are captured in the anti-grav restraints that struggle to lift an amazon’s worth of muscle. Hefted from the ground, she struggles like a chained arch-devil to liberate herself. Seize this vulnerability, because your instruments weren’t built to take this kind of abuse!
and snap into place, wrapping you up. You are stunned!
